⚡ #2475 — InstructionsLoaded Re-architecture

Handlers split by data requirement: per-file work stays on the real single-file event; whole-set analysis moves to SessionStart where the full rule set exists and output is honored.

handlers 7 → 2 + 1 consolidated dispatched hooks 215 → 216 tests 8,849 green fixtures live-payload shape

Before → After event topology

❌ Before — 0 handlers ever ran

CC fires InstructionsLoaded
  { file_path, memory_type, load_reason }
        │
        ▼
dispatcher reads input.files_loaded  ← field
        │                              CC NEVER
  !Array.isArray → silent exit         sends
        │
  7 handlers: NEVER EXECUTE 🚨
        │
  (if they had run:)
  outputPromptContext → additionalContext
        │
  output-guard.mjs STRIPS it
  (event not in allowlist)

Green tests asserted the invented files_loaded shape — false confidence.

✅ After — real payload, honored output

InstructionsLoaded (single-file, typed guard)
  { file_path, memory_type, load_reason }
        │
        ├─ token-budget-tracker   (per-file)
        └─ smart-suggestions      (per-file)
        → silent success / state files

SessionStart (async t=5)
  session-rules-audit  ← NEW consolidated
        │  reads .claude/rules/*.md +
        │  CLAUDE.md from DISK
        ├─ priority-map
        ├─ content-dedup
        ├─ rule-conflicts
        ├─ drift-detection
        └─ debt-surfacer (#2457)
        → additionalContext ✅ HONORED
          (SessionStart is allowlisted)

Edit surface

FileChange
instructions-loaded/instructions-loaded-dispatcher.tsrewritten to real single-file payload + typed guard; per-file handlers only; no more outputPromptContext
instructions-loaded/session-rules-audit.ts (new)consolidated SessionStart handler — reads rule set from disk, runs the 5 cross-file analyzers, emits additionalContext
instructions-loaded/types.ts · src/types.tsInstructionsLoadedInput type + guard; LoadedFile retained for internal disk-read representation
hooks.json · entries/lifecycle.tsSessionStart registration (async t=5); description 215→216 total
9 test filesfixtures rewritten to the LIVE payload shape (files_loaded eliminated); +session-rules-audit tests; count assertions 215→216, async 103→104 with provenance comments
cross-reference-validation.test.tsSessionStart allows the instructions-loaded prefix — routes to lifecycle bundle per run-hook.mjs bundleMap (#1264)

Verification

✅ full hook suite      338 files · 8,849 tests green (worktree-provisioner flake passes isolated)
✅ typecheck + build    clean · plugins/ mirror rebuilt
✅ validate-counts      216 hooks, all sources agree
🎯 the false-green trap is closed: fixtures now mirror the real CC payload,
   so a future payload drift FAILS tests instead of passing silently
